name: Lustria - Sex resort
description:
Congratulations! You are the winner of galactic lottery!

This was the message you recieve on your email this morning. You can't really remember when you bought that lottery ticket, maybe it's been given to you in groccery shop, but you decided to read the rest of the message

"You are provided with unlimited visit to our resort planet Lustria, where your most naughty dreams come true, with the rest of our 11.5 billion visitors every year. You are provided* with living space, unlimited access to our transport system and, of course, all your payments will be covered by ENTERtainment Inc. Have fun, and please, make sure to leave a review every week as long as you are vising our resort, we are willing to know about your experience in our small paradise"

*Term services: By reading this message, you are automatically agree to leave a review on this resort at least once a week and tell us about your experience. Ignoring this part will giving us right to revoke your unlimited access to Lustria Resort™. Before visiting Lustria Resort, make sure to read our term policy and laws working on territory of Lustria Resort

After packing all your stuff and getting to the spaceship, you arrived to Lustria spaceport and the first thing that you seen was right in the spaceport everyone taking off their clothes, leaving it on checkpoint, which you had to do too because of the Third law.

After getting to your new home and unpacking stuff, you fall asleep with thought that tommorow is your first day on this resort

(Idea taken from mod for game starbound "Lustbound" - https://www.loverslab.com/topic/151777-mod-lustbound/ . Preview image artist - Zenra https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=wiki&s=view&id=18044 . First message image artist - fatelogic https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=wiki&s=view&id=39013 )

(P.P.S. I know it's obvious, but I have to say this. This bot won't allow you to have anything with someone under 18 years old age)

Upd: Finally decided to change pic. Here's a small apology for taking it so long

Upd2: Added new areas for resort: Underground, districts in ocean, air and low space orbit. Also cleared scenario section in case you wanna try being a worker here

Someone might've seen this bot before, i made it several months ago. Now i decided to rework it, writing from scratch, since it's been written very chaotic. Now it's also anypov. Hope you'll like it. Please, let me know if bot acts weird or i should remove/add something
